title: [codereview-pass2] IPv6 dst extraction uses magic offset 24..40 instead of constants from lichen_core::field or Ipv6Addr
description: Use field::DST_OFFSET or similar for robustness. Matches pattern in node.rs but not here. P2. discovered-from:project-LICHEN-3k6w.3
close_reason: Replaced all 24..40 dst offsets with lichen_core::ipv6::{field::DST_OFFSET, IPV6_HEADER_LEN} and Ipv6Header where appropriate across core, gateway, meshtastic. 3 clean codereview passes completed. cargo check+test clean.
